assistant_intro: Hello, I’m your AI interviewer for this Full Stack Developer technical round. I’ll first confirm the stack you’d like to focus on, and then I’ll ask one question at a time and adapt based on your answers. I’ll keep the interview technical and tailor the next 5 scored questions to your strengths.

questions.question: To get the interview aligned properly, which backend technologies have you used most confidently in real work for this Full Stack Developer role?

question_focus: Frontend Framework Concepts (e.g., React Hooks, Component Lifecycle)
Backend API Design and Implementation (e.g., Authentication, Error Handling)
Database Schema Design and Query Optimization
Common Data Structures and Algorithm Problem Solving
Basic System Design for Web Applications

interview_variation.freshness_rule: Make this Full Stack Developer interview feel fresh for seed 86f0dd and avoid reusing stock boilerplate wording.

question_outline.question: To get the interview aligned properly, which backend technologies have you used most confidently in real work for this Full Stack Developer role?

summary.summary: You completed the interview. Focus on clearer structure, stronger examples, and tighter role alignment to improve further.
top_strengths: Completed the interview flow with spoken responses.
Covered several expected points across the session.
Showed willingness to explain experience verbally.
improvement_areas: Make answers more specific and evidence-based.
Tie each answer back to the target role or language.
